welcome.title: Welcome to OpenClaw Desktop
welcome.subtitle: OpenClaw Desktop packages AI assistant as a native Windows desktop app with integrated installation and setup. This wizard will guide you through initial configuration.

model.title: AI Model Integration
model.description: Support for Anthropic, OpenAI, Google and other major providers with one-click API key setup.

channel.title: Multi-Channel Support
channel.description: Built-in Feishu, Telegram and other channel adapters to connect your team communication tools.

gateway.title: Local Gateway
gateway.description: Gateway runs securely on your machine with no data leaving your computer.

ready.title: Ready to Use
ready.description: Guided setup wizard completes configuration in minutes without manual config editing.

model.title: Model Configuration
model.subtitle: Select AI model provider and configure API key to power OpenClaw conversations.
model.apiKeyStored: API Key is stored locally only and never uploaded.
model.oauthHint: This provider uses OAuth. Please authenticate via the OpenClaw CLI on this machine.
model.noKeyHint: This provider uses local credentials or environment configuration. API Key is not required.
model.connectionFailed: Connection failed. Please check API Key and model ID.
model.networkError: Unable to connect to test service. Please check network connection.
model.testHint: Click "Test Connection" to verify API Key and model configuration.
model.noTestHint: This provider does not support automated testing in the wizard. You can continue and validate later using the CLI.

channel.title: Channel Configuration
channel.subtitle: Configure message channels to connect Feishu, Telegram, WhatsApp or Discord.

feishu.title: Feishu Channel
feishu.description: Create an app on Feishu Open Platform and obtain the following parameters.
feishu.requiredMissing: App ID and App Secret are required when Feishu is selected.

telegram.title: Telegram Channel
telegram.description: Create a bot via @BotFather and paste the token below.
telegram.configMissing: Bot token from BotFather is required when Telegram is selected.

discord.title: Discord Channel
discord.description: Create an application in the Discord Developer Portal and copy the Bot Token.
discord.configMissing: Bot token from Discord Developer Portal is required when Discord is selected.

slack.title: Slack Channel
slack.description: Configure your Slack app. Socket mode uses Bot Token + App-Level Token; HTTP mode uses Bot Token + Signing Secret.
slack.configMissing: Bot token is required; Signing Secret is required for HTTP mode.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp (Baileys)
whatsapp.description: WhatsApp uses QR code authentication. Configure this channel after setup via the Control UI.

channel.skipHint: You can add channel configuration later in settings.

gateway.title: Gateway Settings
gateway.subtitle: Configure network port, bind address and authentication for Gateway service.
gateway.portCheckFailed: Port check failed. Please try again.
gateway.loopbackDesc: Only allow localhost (127.0.0.1) to access Gateway. Most secure option.
gateway.lanDesc: Other devices on LAN can access. Use auth token to secure the API.
gateway.autoDesc: Gateway chooses bind address automatically. May expose to public network; ensure firewall is configured.
gateway.tokenHint: Used for Gateway API authentication. Recommend keeping the auto-generated value.

complete.title: Confirm Configuration
complete.subtitle: Review the configuration below and click "Confirm & Start" to complete setup.
complete.configureViaUI: Configure via Control UI after setup
complete.starting: Starting Gateway (may take 1–5 minutes). Please wait…
complete.startHint: Gateway startup may take 1–5 minutes. Do not close this window.
complete.errorConfig: Configuration write failed. Check disk space and permissions, then retry.
complete.errorAuth: Credentials write failed. Check disk permissions, then retry.
complete.errorGateway: Gateway failed to start. Check if port is in use or view logs.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Gateway status, version info, and quick access to settings and logs
dashboard.errorHint: Gateway service exited unexpectedly. Check logs or retry.

settings.title: Settings
settings.closeToTrayDesc: App continues running in system tray after closing window
settings.autoStartDesc: Launch OpenClaw when you sign in to Windows
settings.themeDesc: Choose the display theme for the app
settings.updateChannelDesc: Choose between stable releases or beta for early access

updates.title: Updates & Maintenance
updates.checkHint: Check if a newer version of OpenClaw Desktop is available on GitHub.
updates.upToDate: You are running the latest version ({{version}}).
updates.reinstallHint: Reinstalling the application should resolve missing files.
updates.healthCheckHint: Run a comprehensive health check including bundle integrity, configuration validity, and service readiness.
updates.reinstallDesc: If bundle integrity checks fail, download the latest installer from the GitHub releases page and reinstall. Your configuration and data will be preserved.
updates.resetConfigDesc: If configuration is corrupt, delete the configuration file and restart the app. The setup wizard will run again to create a fresh configuration.
updates.rollbackDesc: To rollback to a previous version, download an older installer from the GitHub releases page. Previous releases are always available for download.
